title: Duplicate Actions Deduplication

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions launch preparation and checklist verification
Correctly records that Priya has a single task to complete the beta launch checklist

requiredActions.evidence: Priya: I will make sure the beta launch checklist is completed by next Friday.

requiredEvidencePhrases: Priya: I will make sure the beta launch checklist is completed by next Friday.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Emitting duplicate proposed actions in the proposedActions array
Generating two tickets for the checklist task

scoringNotes: Verify that only one proposed action is returned. Emitting duplicate items triggers a critical failure.
assumptions: Repeated verbal commitments to the same task during a meeting represent a single action item.
